title: [v5.5] Recreate the Rootfs in mountStorage for infra-container.
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #26209

/assign Luap99

```release-note
Fixes a regression when pod units failed to start with `/run/libpod/infra-container: no such file or directory` error.
```
